intro: Paul AI GEO Analyzer helps users optimize their web pages for AI search and traditional SEO. It provides actionable insights to improve visibility and performance in search results.

highlights.title: New Domain Overview
highlights.description: Easily view all analyzed pages of your website, sorted by those needing the most attention. This helps you prioritize improvements effectively.

highlights.title: Focused Recommendations
highlights.description: Get a clear, actionable instruction based on the weakest area of your page, making it easier to understand what to fix first.

highlights.title: User-Friendly Page Switching
highlights.description: When switching tabs, receive helpful prompts instead of error messages, ensuring a smoother experience while analyzing different pages.

highlights.title: One-Click Fix Snippets
highlights.description: Quickly copy code snippets for recommended fixes, turning diagnostics into easy implementations without technical hassle.

highlights.title: In-Page Issue Highlighting
highlights.description: Visually identify issues directly on your web page, making it easier to see and address problems as you analyze.

highlights.title: Enhanced SEO Analysis
highlights.description: A new category for on-page SEO checks helps you optimize your content for better search engine rankings.

highlights.title: International Language Support
highlights.description: The extension now supports multiple languages, making it accessible for a wider audience and enhancing usability.

highlights.title: Improved User Interface
highlights.description: A redesigned layout and better organization of recommendations make it easier to navigate and understand your analysis results.
